title: 东方梦幻肖像
description: 梦幻东方女性肖像，强调祖母绿配饰、柔和金色光影与高级商业人像质感。
prompt:
梦幻东方女性人像，成年女性，近景肖像，精致五官，白皙通透肌肤，细腻但干净的皮肤质感，祖母绿色眼睛，柔和迷人眼神，棕色微卷发自然散落；
米白色蕾丝头饰，青绿色蝴蝶点缀，珍珠装饰，服饰为精致蕾丝礼服，结构清晰，纹理干净不过度复杂，祖母绿宝石饰品；
光影为柔和暖金色侧逆光，轮廓光清晰但不过曝，皮肤有轻微高光但不过度反射，整体光线干净通透，背景柔和虚化，浅景深；
高级人像摄影质感，细节清晰但克制，无颗粒感，无噪点，真实物理光影，8K，商业级质感。比例：9:16

title: Silicon Valley 2026 Promo Poster
description: 以双重曝光和城市地图叙事呈现的硅谷 2026 城市宣传海报，兼具科技感与高级品牌视觉。
prompt:
A refined 2026 Silicon Valley city promotional poster with a futuristic yet elegant atmosphere.

Double exposure composition, preserving an S-shaped sense of flowing movement. On a pure white textured background, in the lower-right corner, a miniature figure dressed in sleek modern techwear is releasing a long ribbon of luminous silver-blue light. The ribbon flows gracefully through the air, showing a soft silk-like texture, and as it drifts toward the upper-left, it magically transforms into a grand landscape of rolling hills, coastline, data streams, and illuminated urban terrain.

Within this flowing “river of light,” overlay a hand-drawn panoramic map of Silicon Valley, blending technology, nature, innovation, and California sunlight. The scene feels visionary, expansive, sophisticated, and inspiring.

Include iconic Silicon Valley and Bay Area elements: Stanford University arches, Apple Park, Google campus-inspired buildings, Meta-like glass offices, Tesla-style innovation imagery, venture capital offices on Sand Hill Road, Palo Alto tree-lined streets, San Jose skyline, the Santa Cruz Mountains, San Francisco Bay, highways, autonomous vehicles, startup labs, semiconductor patterns, AI data centers, and subtle circuit-board textures.

Surrounded by soft mist, golden California light, floating clouds, and delicate digital particles. Rich colors, complex structure, highly detailed, grand and breathtaking, yet still fresh and minimal because of the large areas of white space.

In the lower-left corner, elegant typography reads “SILICON VALLEY 2026” with a vertical promotional slogan: “Where Ideas Shape Tomorrow.” Beautiful editorial layout, graceful spacing, clear and complete lettering, premium city branding poster, cinematic lighting, sophisticated details, 9:16 aspect ratio.

title: Cyberpunk Neon Portrait
description: 赛博朋克夜景中的霓虹女性近景肖像，强调潮湿反光与未来植入细节。
prompt: A close-up portrait of a woman with short silver hair in a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. Neon signs in pink and teal reflect off wet surfaces and her metallic jacket. Futuristic face implants glow softly beneath the skin. Shot with a wide-aperture lens, bokeh of city lights in the background.

title: TikTok Shop Product Detail – BLENDLY Portable Blender
description: TikTok Shop 风格便携榨汁机商品详情图，强调年轻化视觉与清晰卖点展示。
prompt: Create a single TikTok Shop–style product detail image for an e-commerce listing. Use a completely different product from the previous bottle example: show one trendy compact portable blender as the hero product. The blender should be a modern mini personal smoothie blender in a soft pastel peach color, with a transparent cup body, simple lid, and clean minimal branding reading "BLENDLY". Make the layout feel like a TikTok Shop product detail single image: energetic, modern, youth-oriented, visually catchy, and conversion-focused, while still staying clean and polished. Use a light background with subtle pastel gradients and soft shadowing. Place the blender large in the center. Around it, add stylish feature callouts with clear icons and short English marketing copy. Include 4 feature points: "USB Rechargeable", "6-Blade Powerful Crush", "Portable 420ml Size", and "Easy One-Touch Operation". Add one bottom info strip or badge area with text: "For Smoothies, Shakes & Fresh Juice". Include small decorative elements such as sparkles, rounded labels, subtle gradient stickers, or soft geometric shapes to make it feel social-commerce friendly. Do not place the product inside a phone mockup. Do not clutter the image with too many extra objects. Make it look like a real high-quality TikTok Shop product detail image, highly appealing, stylish, and platform-appropriate.

title: 角色设定海报
description: 角色设计简介海报，整合主肖像、表情、动作、配色与人物设定信息。
prompt:
基于上传的图像创建一个角色设计图。

设计：角色简介海报

包括：
1. 大型主肖像 
2. 各种面部表情（开心、生气、困倦、惊讶等等）
3. 动作姿势（跑步、玩耍）（基于个性） 
4. 小型物体图标 
5. 配色方案部分 
6. 简介部分，包括名称和个性

title: 潘金莲陌陌配对
description: 古典人物与现代社交应用结合的趣味配对场景，带有强烈戏剧反差。
prompt: 潘金莲注册陌陌右滑匹配到西门庆，配对成功页面弹出爱心特效

title: 抖音直播截图
description: 仿抖音直播界面的明星直播截图，突出手持文案牌和竖屏传播感。
prompt: 9:16 纵向比例，生成一张抖音直播截图，画面中是刘亦菲在直播，刘亦菲手里拿着一块牌子，牌子上写着：今晚直播，欢迎来和亦菲聊天！

title: TikTok直播截图
description: 仿 TikTok 直播界面的女性主播截图，适合短视频平台内容演示。
prompt: 生成一张 TikTok 直播截图，画面里是一位漂亮女性正在直播。

title: 1980 年代宣传海报
description: 复古 1980 年代宣传海报，将科技人物与夸张时代视觉语言结合。
prompt: 生成一张 1980 年代风格的宣传海报。使用精确标语“热烈庆祝GPT-Image-2全量开放”。海报中包含 Sam Altman、Dario Amodei 和 Elon Musk，并且给 Dario Amodei 戴上一条红领巾。

title: 淘宝商品详情 · 充电护眼台灯
description: 淘宝风格充电护眼台灯商品详情图，突出促销信息与转化型卖点布局。
prompt: Create a single Taobao-style e-commerce product detail image with a completely different product: a foldable rechargeable desk lamp for students and home office use. The product should be a sleek modern LED desk lamp in a warm cream color, shown as the main hero object on a clean desktop scene. The layout should strongly resemble a Chinese Taobao product detail single image: bold headline hierarchy, strong promotional atmosphere, price emphasis, sales-style badges, trust icons, feature bullets, and conversion-oriented composition. Use Chinese text throughout the design. Main headline should communicate that this is a rechargeable eye-care study lamp suitable for students, reading, and work. Add 4 key selling points in Chinese with icons, such as: national AA-level brightness / eye-care soft light, three-level brightness and color adjustment, large-capacity battery with long endurance, and foldable space-saving design. Add a strong promotional price block in the lower left with a bold RMB price, plus a CTA button style area. Include trust signals along the bottom such as official genuine product guarantee, 7-day no-reason return, free charging cable gift, and a large warranty statement like "三年质保 以换代修". Add one dramatic sale badge such as "销量TOP1" and one red/orange discount sticker such as "限时直降30元". The color palette should be warm cream, beige, orange, and light brown. The final image should feel like a polished real Taobao product detail single image: dense but organized, highly commercial, eye-catching, trustworthy, and optimized for conversion.

title: Steampunk Inventor
description: 蒸汽朋克发明家角色设定图，展示机械义肢、黄铜护目镜与复古工坊气质。
prompt: A character concept for a steampunk inventor: a wiry old man with wild white hair, brass goggles pushed up on his forehead, a leather apron covered in tool loops, and a mechanical prosthetic arm with visible gears and pistons. He holds a glowing vial in one hand. Warm sepia and copper tones, detailed ink-and-wash illustration style. Front view with color callouts.

title: AI Virtual Human – LUMi Character Styling Portrait
description: 高端 AI 虚拟人定妆照，强调未来时尚、商业形象与中国市场审美。
prompt: Create a polished character key visual / final styling portrait for an AI virtual human. Show a fashionable young East Asian female virtual persona, about 22–28 years old, with a refined, memorable face, expressive eyes, healthy skin, and a confident but approachable expression. She should look like a premium AI virtual influencer or virtual host. Present her as a professional "character styling photo" (定妆照): a clean, high-end studio portrait with a full or three-quarter body main pose, elegant posture, and a well-designed futuristic outfit. Visual direction: bright and clean, not dark. Use a light premium background with subtle gradient, soft white and pale blue tones, and minimal futuristic graphic accents. Outfit should blend modern fashion with subtle sci-fi details: tailored jacket or sleek bodysuit layers, metallic trims, smart wearable accents, tasteful accessories, and a distinctive silhouette. Hair should be stylish and recognizable, slightly futuristic but realistic. Include subtle makeup and polished styling. Composition: one main hero portrait centered, with a strong commercial look, similar to official character launch art or entertainment industry styling photos. Optionally include a couple of smaller side profile or close-up supporting views in the layout to enhance the design presentation. Include a small stylish title area with simple readable text such as "AI VIRTUAL HUMAN" and a short descriptor like "Character Styling Portrait", integrated elegantly into the layout. Mood: intelligent, warm, aspirational, futuristic, elegant. Rendering style: ultra-detailed, realistic with a slight high-end CG polish, fashion editorial quality, sharp facial details, clean lighting, beautiful fabric textures, premium presentation, Chinese-market friendly aesthetics.

title: Fictional Anime Movie Poster
description: 架空动画电影海报，突出日系叙事感与电影主视觉氛围。
prompt: 架空のアニメ映画のポスターをGPT image2で作成。
